title: COVID-19 health product industry - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 health product industry
Information for health product manufacturers and distributors in relation to COVID-19

## Services and information
List of devices for urgent public health need, guidance for industry, authorized products, who to contact
Clinical trials, expedited access, drug shortages, special access, who to contact

### Disinfectants, hand sanitizers, cleaners and soaps
Expedited access, information for manufacturers, lists of products, who to contact
Regulatory agility, health product access and shortages, international engagement, developing drugs and vaccines

### Mobilizing industry to provide medical supplies
Information for manufacturers, supply and procurement, scale-up and re-tooling, donations, research and funding

### Advertising complaints
How to report, lists of complaints on authorized and un-authorized products
Information on Health Canada inspections during COVID-19
